markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on the CVE project launch and refine the CS101 content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**CVE Launch Delayed:** The CVE project launch is delayed to next Thursday, pending a Friday demo and a full QA cycle by SentinelOne's India-based teams.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [**CVE Strategy Shift:** The strategy shifts from a gradual, SEO-driven rollout to publishing all CVEs from 2020 onward, year-by-year, to build a comprehensive database.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [**CS101 Workflow:** The CS101 workflow will remain Google Docs for collaboration, with final drafts pushed to ContentStack for SentinelOne's preview and publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [**CS101 Topic Feedback:** Future CS101 topic suggestions must target unique, high-volume keywords to meet SentinelOne's demand-led content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)

## Topics

### CVE Project Launch & Strategy

  - [**Launch Timeline:** The launch is delayed to next Thursday (tentative).](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
      - [**Friday:** Marcus and George demo the instance to SentinelOne's web team.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [**Monday:** SentinelOne's India-based QA and SEO teams begin a full review.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [**Next Thursday:** Go-live, pending fixes from the QA cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [**Publishing Cadence:** The initial plan of 20 CVEs/day is scrapped.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
      - [**Rationale:** SentinelOne's indexing is fast (e.g., 800 of 929 French pages indexed in 2–3 days), enabling a faster rollout.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [**New Strategy → Build a Comprehensive Database:**](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create a definitive vulnerability database by publishing all CVEs from 2020 onward.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [**Execution:** Publish CVEs year-by-year (e.g., all of 2025, then all of 2024).](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
      - [**Data Source:** Use SentinelOne's NVD API pull to ensure the database is complete, not limited to SEO tool-driven lists.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)

### CS101 Content & Workflow

  - [**Q3 Revisions:** 7 article revisions will be delivered today (Thursday) to meet the Q3 deadline.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [**New Articles:** 5 new articles are bumped to next week.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [**ContentStack Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
      - [**Process:** Draft in Google Docs → Get final approval → Push final version to ContentStack as a draft.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Google Docs is superior for collaborative feedback; ContentStack is for final preview and publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [**Topic Strategy Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
      - [**Requirement:** Topic suggestions must target unique, high-volume keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
      - [**Rationale:** SentinelOne's demand-led strategy requires focusing on topics with proven search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)

### Looker Dashboard Updates

  - [**Action:** Remove non-GrowthX URLs from the Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This will isolate GrowthX content performance, making it easier to analyze.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
      - [Follow up with Marcus to schedule the Friday CVE demo.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
      - [Update the Looker dashboard to remove non-GrowthX URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [Deliver 7 CS101 revisions today (Thursday).](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [Update the CVE content calendar for the new year-by-year strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
      - [Investigate the CS101-to-ContentStack workflow with the engineering team.](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [**Ankit:**](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
      - [Prioritize the CVE database build (P0) over the CS101 workflow (P1).](https://fathom.video/share/V91Sr4Qwm3YF3rSezTv-WAboFYqauz-v?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
